rag_rules: Repair only clauses that reference unresolved identifiers or type mismatches in AGREE annexes; delete invalid clauses rather than extending architecture.
generic_rules: Use only AADL-visible features or locally declared eq/const helpers in AGREE expressions.
Ensure boolean comparisons use bool-typed helpers; arithmetic uses int/real as appropriate.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: eq name : type = expression; must match the type of the right-hand side.
guarantee and assume clauses must not reference AADL properties or unit tokens as if they were variables.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or assume AADL properties are automatically visible in AGREE.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
